_comment: USD per 1,000,000 tokens. PRICES DRIFT — keep _updated current. cost = sum over models of (in*in + out*out + cache_read*cache_read) / 1e6. The CLI's total_cost_usd is Anthropic-priced and will be wrong for non-Anthropic backends; recompute from this map using the modelUsage keys in the result envelope. Fill the zeros from your provider's pricing page.
